title: Lava Chicken Disc Backport
description: adds the "lava chicken" music disc from 1.21.7 to earlier versions of Minecraft
body: At the moment, the disc is obtainable by crafting a lava bucket, any disc, and one raw chicken together (the placement of items does not matter). At some point, I will make it obtainable by 1.21.7's method (which is killing a baby zombie that is riding a chicken).
